description: Collection Management System MVP - Catalog, track, and browse collectible items across any category

userStories.title: Scaffold .NET 8 Web API with EF Core and SQL Server
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a .NET 8 Web API project with Entity Framework Core configured for SQL Server so that we have a foundation to build on.
acceptanceCriteria: Add EF Core with SQL Server provider packages
Configure DbContext with connection string for localhost,1433 sa/P@ssw0rd ApplicationDB
Add a health check endpoint GET /api/health that returns 200

userStories.title: Add User entity with ASP.NET Identity
userStories.description: As a developer, I need user accounts with ASP.NET Identity so that authentication can be built on top.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ApplicationUser entity extending IdentityUser with: DisplayName, Avatar, Bio, PreferredLanguage, PreferredCurrency

userStories.title: Add CollectionType entity with custom field schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the CollectionType entity to define schemas for collections with custom fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Create CollectionType entity with: Id, Name, Description, Icon, CustomFieldSchema (JSON column)
CustomFieldSchema supports field types: text, number, date, enum, boolean, image_url
Each custom field definition has: name, type, required, options (for enum)
Add EF Core configuration and migration
Maximum of 10 custom fields per collection type

userStories.title: Add Collection entity
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Collection entity to group catalog items under a user and collection type.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Collection entity with: Id, UserId, CollectionTypeId, Name, Description, CoverImage, Visibility (enum: Private/Public/Shared)
Add foreign keys to ApplicationUser and CollectionType
Add EF Core configuration and migration

userStories.title: Add CatalogItem entity with custom fields
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the CatalogItem entity to represent official collectibles in a collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Create CatalogItem entity with: Id, CollectionId, Identifier, Name, Description, ReleaseDate, Manufacturer, ReferenceCode, Image, Rarity, CustomFieldValues (JSON column)
Add EF Core configuration and migration

userStories.title: Add OwnedCopy entity
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the OwnedCopy entity to track physical copies a user owns of catalog items.
acceptanceCriteria: Create OwnedCopy entity with: Id, CatalogItemId, Condition (enum: Mint/NearMint/Excellent/Good/Fair/Poor), PurchasePrice, EstimatedValue, AcquisitionDate, AcquisitionSource, Notes, Images (JSON array)
Add EF Core configuration and migration

userStories.title: Add Set and SetItem entities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Set and SetItem entities for checklist-style completion tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Set entity with: Id, CollectionId, Name, ExpectedItemCount
Create SetItem entity with: Id, SetId, CatalogItemId (nullable), Name, SortOrder
Add foreign keys to Collection and CatalogItem
Add EF Core configuration and migration

userStories.title: Add WishlistItem entity
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the WishlistItem entity so users can track items they want to acquire.
acceptanceCriteria: Create WishlistItem entity with: Id, CollectionId, CatalogItemId (nullable), Name, Priority (int), TargetPrice, Notes
Add foreign keys to Collection and CatalogItem
Add EF Core configuration and migration

userStories.title: Add JWT authentication endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to register, login, and logout so that I can access my collections securely.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/register - creates user account, returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login - authenticates user, returns JWT token
JWT token includes user ID and email claims
Protected endpoints return 401 without valid token

userStories.title: Add user profile API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view and edit my profile so that I can personalize my account.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /api/profile - updates display name, bio, preferred language, preferred currency
POST /api/profile/avatar - uploads avatar image (store locally in wwwroot/uploads)

userStories.title: Add CollectionType CRUD API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and manage collection types with custom field schemas.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/collection-types - creates collection type with custom fields
Validates custom field types are supported

userStories.title: Add Collection CRUD API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and manage collections to organize my collectibles.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/collections/{id} - gets single collection with item count
All endpoints require authentication and ownership check

userStories.title: Add CatalogItem CRUD API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add and manage catalog items in my collections.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/collections/{collectionId}/items/{id} - gets single item with owned copies
POST /api/collections/{collectionId}/items - creates catalog item with custom field values
Custom field values validated against collection type schema
All endpoints require authentication and ownership check

userStories.title: Add OwnedCopy CRUD API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to register and manage owned copies of catalog items, including duplicates.
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple copies allowed per catalog item (duplicates supported)
Condition must be valid enum value
All endpoints require authentication and ownership check

userStories.title: Add Set CRUD API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create sets and add expected items for completion tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/collections/{collectionId}/sets/{id} - gets set with items and completion status
POST /api/collections/{collectionId}/sets/{id}/items - adds items to set (supports bulk)
All endpoints require authentication and ownership check

userStories.title: Add set completion tracking logic
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see completion percentage for my sets based on owned items.
acceptanceCriteria: A set item is 'complete' if its linked CatalogItem has at least one OwnedCopy
Completion recalculates when owned copies are added or removed

userStories.title: Add Wishlist CRUD API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage a wishlist of items I want to acquire.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/collections/{collectionId}/wishlist - lists wishlist items ordered by priority
All endpoints require authentication and ownership check

userStories.title: Add search, filter, and sort API for catalog items
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search, filter, and sort catalog items to find what I need.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/collections/{collectionId}/items supports query param: search (searches name, description)

userStories.title: Add dashboard analytics API endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard API that returns aggregate stats for my collections.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/dashboard returns: totalCollections, totalItems, totalOwnedCopies, totalEstimatedValue, totalInvested
Returns collectionSummaries (name, itemCount, ownedCount, value per collection)

userStories.title: Add CSV and JSON export API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export my collection data as CSV or JSON for backup.
acceptanceCriteria: Export includes catalog items with custom fields and owned copies
CSV has header row with column names

userStories.title: Add CSV import API endpoint with validation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to import catalog items from CSV to bulk-populate my collection.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/collections/{id}/import/preview - returns parsed rows with validation errors (does not save)
Validates required fields and custom field types against collection type schema
Returns count of imported items and any row-level errors

userStories.title: Scaffold React + TypeScript frontend with Vite
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React + TypeScript frontend project so that we can build the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Create React + TypeScript project in /workspaces/GeekVault/src/web using Vite
Install and configure React Router for client-side routing
Install a UI component library (e.g., shadcn/ui or similar)
Configure proxy to backend API at localhost:5000 (or similar)
App renders a placeholder home page

userStories.title: Add app layout with sidebar navigation and theme toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I want a sidebar navigation and light/dark theme so that I can navigate the app easily.
acceptanceCriteria: App has persistent sidebar with links: Dashboard, Collections, Wishlist, Profile
Header bar with app logo and theme toggle button
Light and dark theme support using CSS variables or theme provider
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add i18n with English and Portuguese
userStories.description: As a user, I want to use the app in English or Portuguese.
acceptanceCriteria: Install and configure i18n library (e.g., react-i18next)
Create English translation file with all UI strings
Create Portuguese translation file with all UI strings
Language selector in app header or settings
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add login and register pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want to register and login so that I can access my collections.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page with email and password fields
Register page with email, password, and display name fields
Stores JWT token and redirects to dashboard on success
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add collection types management page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and manage collection types with custom field definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create form with name, description, icon fields
Custom field builder: add/remove fields with name, type, required, options
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add collections list page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all my collections and create new ones.
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays collection cards with cover image, name, item count
Create collection button opens form (name, description, collection type, cover image)
Clicking a collection card navigates to collection detail page
Edit and delete collection from card menu
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add collection detail page with gallery grid
userStories.description: As a user, I want to browse catalog items in a visual gallery grid within a collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Page shows collection header with name, description, cover image
Catalog items displayed in responsive gallery grid with images
Add catalog item button opens creation form
Form includes custom fields based on collection type schema
Owned items visually distinguished from unowned
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add catalog item detail view
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view full details of a catalog item including its owned copies.
acceptanceCriteria: Detail view (modal or page) shows all catalog item fields
Lists owned copies with condition, price, acquisition info
Edit and delete catalog item buttons
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add owned copies management UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to register, edit, and delete owned copies from the catalog item detail view.
acceptanceCriteria: Add owned copy button in catalog item detail view
Form with condition dropdown, purchase price, estimated value, acquisition date, source, notes
Edit and delete owned copy inline
Multiple copies allowed per item (duplicates visible)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add set management page with completion progress
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create sets within a collection and see completion progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Sets tab or section within collection detail page
Add items to set (search existing catalog items or add by name)
Each set shows progress bar with completion percentage
Set items show owned/unowned status with visual indicator
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add wishlist page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my wishlist of desired items across collections.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows wishlist items grouped by collection
Add wishlist item form with name, priority, target price, notes, optional catalog item link
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add dashboard page with analytics charts
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard showing collection stats and charts.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page accessible from sidebar (default landing page)
Shows stat cards: total collections, total items, total owned, total estimated value
Chart: items by condition (pie or bar chart)
Collection summary cards with item counts and values
Install chart library (e.g., recharts or chart.js)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add search, filter, and sort UI for catalog items
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search, filter, and sort items within a collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Search input that filters items by name in the collection detail page
Filter dropdown for condition (All, Mint, Near Mint, Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor)
Filter toggle for owned status (All, Owned, Unowned)
Sort dropdown (Name, Price, Value, Date, Rarity) with asc/desc toggle
Filters and sort persist in URL query params
Calls backend search/filter/sort API with params
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add import and export UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export and import collection data from the collection detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: Export button with format selection (CSV, JSON) triggers file download
Import button opens file upload dialog (CSV only)
Import preview step shows parsed rows with validation errors highlighted
Confirm import button saves validated data
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add user profile page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view and edit my profile including avatar, display name, and preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows display name, email, avatar, bio
Edit form for display name, bio, preferred language, preferred currency
Language change updates app language immediately
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
